name: @smol-workflows/sdk
description: TypeScript SDK and workflow runtime types for smol-workflow.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && rm -f dist/workflow-extra-virtual.js dist/workflow-extra-virtual.js.map dist/workflow-extra-virtual.d.ts.map && cp src/workflow-extra-virtual.d.ts dist/workflow-extra-virtual.d.ts && tmp=$(mktemp) && printf '/// <reference path="./workflow-extra-virtual.d.ts" />\n' > $tmp && cat dist/index.d.ts >> $tmp && mv $tmp dist/index.d.ts
